unit: Unit 8: Apps and the App Store
title: Deleting and Uninstalling
drDigitalIntro: Drag an app to Trash to uninstall it, or right-click and choose Move to Trash. Some apps have an uninstaller — run it to remove the app completely. Deleting an app frees up space on your Mac. If you buy an app from the App Store, you can reinstall it free anytime. Deleting an app doesn't delete your documents — those stay safely in your folders.
drDigitalSuccess: You can remove apps you don't use!
drDigitalHint: Dragging to Trash is the easiest way to uninstall.
